items.title: No 10 says Falklands sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'
items.dek: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.
items.body: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Nato says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain
items.dek: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.
items.body: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: UK biobank data incident caused by 'a few bad apples', boss says
items.dek: Professor Sir Rory Collins said he was "angry" and "upset" about the incident, as both the bank's boss and a participant.
items.body: Professor Sir Rory Collins said he was "angry" and "upset" about the incident, as both the bank's boss and a participant.
items.author: IriLine Desk
